name: reviewer-logging
description:
Review logging practices for quality, configurability, and best practices. Use when: auditing a codebase, reviewing PRs with logging changes, setting up logging in a new project, or when logs are unhelpful for debugging. Checks against user's standards (CLAUDE.md) + general best practices.

Examples:

<example>
user: "review the logging in this project"
assistant: "I'll use the logging reviewer to audit your logging practices."
</example>

<example>
user: "I can never find what I need in the logs"
assistant: "I'll use the logging reviewer to identify gaps in your logging setup."
</example>

<example>
user: "setting up logging for this new service"
assistant: "I'll use the logging reviewer to suggest a solid logging foundation."
</example>
